ci_support_linux_64_cuda_compiler_versio:
c_compiler:
- gcc
c_compiler_version:
- '14'
c_stdlib:
- sysroot
c_stdlib_version:
- '2.17'
channel_sources:
- conda-forge
channel_targets:
- conda-forge main
cuda_compiler:
- cuda-nvcc
cuda_compiler_version:
- '12.9'
cxx_compiler:
- gxx
cxx_compiler_version:
- '14'
docker_image:
- quay.io/condaforge/linux-anvil-x86_64:alma9
target_platform:
- linux-64
xz:
- '5'
zip_keys:
- - c_compiler_version
  - cxx_compiler_version
  - c_stdlib_version
  - cuda_compiler_version

about.description: Fast, GPU-powered components for electronic structure theory
Fast, GPU-powered components for electronic structure theory

name: libcuest-split
raw_meta_yaml:
{% set name = "libcuest" %}
{% set version = "0.1.0.7" %}
{% set cuda_compiler_version = cuda_compiler_version | default("None") %}
{% set abiversion = version.split('.')[0] %}
{% set majorminorpatch = '.'.join(version.split('.')[:3]) %}
{% set platform = "linux-x86_64" %}  # [linux64]
{% set platform = "linux-sbsa" %}  # [aarch64]
{% set target_name = "x86_64-linux" %}  # [linux64]
{% set target_name = "sbsa-linux" %}  # [aarch64]
{% set extension = "tar.xz" %}  # [not win]

package:
  name: {{ name|lower }}-split
  version: {{ version }}

source:
  url: https://developer.download.nvidia.com/compute/cuest/redist/{{ name }}/{{ platform }}/{{ name }}-{{ platform }}-{{ version }}_cuda12-archive.{{ extension }}  # [(cuda_compiler_version or "").startswith("12")]
  url: https://developer.download.nvidia.com/compute/cuest/redist/{{ name }}/{{ platform }}/{{ name }}-{{ platform }}-{{ version }}_cuda13-archive.{{ extension }}  # [(cuda_compiler_version or "").startswith("13")]
  sha256: bc84a242d2841a0024201006aeec899523de82d3281ea644e217acc97e864cfe  # [linux64 and (cuda_compiler_version or "").startswith("12")]]
  sha256: c89532972700ce4b2db956f76631c2bff135cc9b2e9484181f90f5d7a1af4dd7  # [linux64 and (cuda_compiler_version or "").startswith("13")]]
  sha256: 4bd96df640b97118af4320f3a053b49acab05376ea6c227f447348b361421aac  # [linux and aarch64 and (cuda_compiler_version or "").startswith("12")]]
  sha256: ecfcd9878dd345a39675efaf4f5cf11792255b1bf23f61d392d7711425b58529  # [linux and aarch64 and (cuda_compiler_version or "").startswith("13")]]

build:
  number: 0
  skip: true  # [not (linux64 or aarch64) or cuda_compiler_version in ("None", "")]

requirements:
  build:
    - cf-nvidia-tools 1.*  # [linux]

outputs:
  - name: libcuest
    build:
      # Ignore run_exports on cuda-version which we need to add to avoid hash collision as we have multiple CTK support
      ignore_run_exports:
        - cuda-version
      # cuda-version will take care of constraining versions for the following
      # and thus we should ignore the run exports from them which are more strict
      ignore_run_exports_from:
        - libcublas-dev
        - libcusolver-dev
        - libcusparse-dev
        - libnvjitlink-dev
    files:
      - lib/libcuest*.so.*
    requirements:
      build:
        - {{ compiler("c") }}
        - {{ compiler("cxx") }}
        - {{ stdlib("c") }}
        - {{ compiler('cuda') }}
      host:
        - libcublas-dev
        - libcusolver-dev
        - libcusparse-dev
        - libnvjitlink-dev
        - cuda-version {{ cuda_compiler_version }}
      run:
        - libcublas
        - libcusolver
        - libcusparse
        - libnvjitlink
        - {{ pin_compatible('cuda-version', max_pin='x', min_pin='x') }}
    test:
      commands:
        - test -f $PREFIX/lib/libcuest.so.{{ majorminorpatch }}
        - test -L $PREFIX/lib/libcuest.so.{{ abiversion }}

  - name: libcuest-dev
    build:
      ignore_run_exports:
        - cuda-version
      # Export libcuest for a consuming feedstock that needs libcuest-dev in their host: section
      # For this lib, the breaking changes occur at the minor version (until major version reaches 1)
      run_exports:
        - {{ pin_subpackage("libcuest", max_pin="x.x") }}
    files:
      - lib/libcuest*.so
      - include/
    requirements:
      build:
        - {{ compiler("c") }}
        - {{ compiler("cxx") }}
        - {{ stdlib("c") }}
        - {{ compiler('cuda') }}
      host:
        - cuda-version {{ cuda_compiler_version }}
        - {{ pin_subpackage("libcuest", exact=True) }}
      run:
        - {{ pin_compatible("cuda-version", min_pin="x", max_pin="x") }}
        - {{ pin_subpackage("libcuest", exact=True) }}
    test:
      commands:
        - test -L $PREFIX/lib/libcuest.so
        - test -f $PREFIX/include/cuest.h
        - test -d $PREFIX/include/cuest

  - name: libcuest-static
    build:
      ignore_run_exports:
        - cuda-version
    files:
      - lib/libcuest_static.a
    requirements:
      build:
        - {{ compiler("c") }}
        - {{ compiler("cxx") }}
        - {{ stdlib("c") }}
        - {{ compiler('cuda') }}
      host:
        - cuda-version {{ cuda_compiler_version }}
        - {{ pin_subpackage("libcuest-dev", exact=True) }}
      run:
        - {{ pin_compatible("cuda-version", min_pin="x", max_pin="x") }}
        - {{ pin_subpackage("libcuest-dev", exact=True) }}
    test:
      commands:
        - test -f $PREFIX/lib/libcuest_static.a

about:
  home: https://developer.nvidia.com/cuest
  license: LicenseRef-NVIDIA-End-User-License-Agreement
  license_file: LICENSE
  license_url: https://docs.nvidia.com/cuda/cuest/latest/license.html
  summary: cuEST - GPU-powered electronic structure theory
  description: |
    Fast, GPU-powered components for electronic structure theory
  doc_url: https://docs.nvidia.com/cuda/cuest/

extra:
  feedstock-name: libcuest
  recipe-maintainers:
    - conda-forge/cuda
